task_completion.description: LibreOffice Calc is open displaying the grades spreadsheet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreOffice Calc window is visible, showing the 'Grades' sheet with sections for Homework, Quizzes, Midterm, and Final Exam.

task_completion.description: The current grade is calculated in cell B21.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Cell B21 displays a value of approximately 56.3 (acceptable range is 55.3 to 57.3).

task_completion.description: The needed final score is calculated in cell B23.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Cell B23 displays a value of approximately 96.29 (acceptable range is 94.79 to 97.79).

task_completion.description: Formulas are used for calculations instead of hardcoded values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In at least one screenshot, the formula bar or cell input shows a mathematical formula (starting with '=') being entered or selected for cell B21 or B23, proving the agent calculated the values using spreadsheet functions.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice Calc GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the LibreOffice Calc interface, rather than terminal commands or Python scripts modifying the file.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected final numbers into the cells.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen typing formulas (e.g., using cell references, weights, and math operators) rather than directly typing '56.3' or '96.29' into the cells.

integrity.description: The agent worked on the provided my_grades.ods file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The spreadsheet contains the pre-filled synthetic data (Homework scores: 95, 88, 92, 100, 85; Quiz scores: 82, 90, 78, 88; Midterm: 84) and was not created from scratch.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires calculating the current grade and the needed final exam score in a LibreOffice Calc spreadsheet. Expected current grade (Cell B21): ~56.3 (Tolerance ±1.0). Expected needed final score (Cell B23): ~96.29 (Tolerance ±1.5). Target final grade is 90. The agent must use formulas to calculate these values, not just type the final numbers.
